# daytona_create_sandbox_snapshot (Action)

Starts Daytona snapshot creation from a sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_create_sandbox_snapshot" "example" {
  config {
    sandbox_id_or_name = "sandbox-id-or-name"
    name               = "snapshot-name"
    include_memory     = false
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name for the new Daytona snapshot.
- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Daytona sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `include_memory` (Boolean) Whether to include VM memory in the snapshot when Daytona supports memory snapshots for the sandbox.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID` for this action. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
